problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating may resolve How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
